FRIENDLY AI CONFIDENCE

WAYS TO WORK TOGETHER

Pick the support that fits the moment: a confidence boost, a board-ready explanation, a team sprint, or a circle of women learning together.

Services include executive AI coaching, friendly AI literacy workshops, board and leadership briefings, practical adoption sprints, and women’s AI leadership circles.

AI Strategy + Governance

Board-ready language, opportunity maps, risk questions, and executive decisions without the jargon fog.

Executive AI Coaching

Private support for women leaders building confidence, fluency, and visible authority in the AI era.

Adoption Sprints

Focused sessions that turn use cases into workflows, habits, and team-level momentum.

ROAR Leadership Circles

Small, human rooms for women leaders to practice courage, compare notes, and move together.

Lakecia Gunter — AI strategy and leadership advisory for women ready to lead the room. ROAR
